title: elymus stebbinsii
intro: Elymus stebbinsii, also known as Stebbins' wheatgrass or wild wheatgrass, is a perennial grass native to the western United States. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus stebbinsii include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being. Elymus stebbinsii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal properties, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
